section.name: Alpha Notice
section.p: ⚠ This plugin is in early-phase development (alpha). APIs, configuration schemas, HST component interfaces, and JCR node types are subject to change without notice between releases. Do not treat any aspect of this plugin as stable until a non-SNAPSHOT version is published to Bloomreach Forge.

section.name: Overview
section.p: Configuration is resolved in two layers: a shared global brxdis:discoveryConfig node for credentials and structural defaults, then optional per-channel overrides from hst:channelinfo for account/domain values and secret env-var names.

tr.td: Override account ID for this channel.
Override domain key for this channel.
Name of the env var holding the API key for this channel.
Name of the env var holding the Pathways auth key for this channel.

div.source: /hst:hst/hst:configurations/<your-site>/hst:workspace/hst:channel/hst:channelinfo: jcr:primaryType: hst:channelinfo discoveryAccountId: '6413' discoveryDomainKey: pacifichome discoveryApiKeyEnvVar: BRXDIS_API_KEY discoveryAuthKeyEnvVar: BRXDIS_AUTH_KEY

tr.td: Search and category API base URI.

section.name: Global config node
section.p: The shared config path is fixed for every channel:

div.source: definitions: config: /hippo:configuration/hippo:modules/brxm-discovery/hippo:moduleconfig/discoveryConfig: jcr:primaryType: brxdis:discoveryConfig brxdis:accountId: 'your-account-id' brxdis:domainKey: 'your-domain-key' brxdis:apiKey: '' brxdis:authKey: '' brxdis:baseUri: 'https://core.dxpapi.com' brxdis:pathwaysBaseUri: 'https://pathways.dxpapi.com' brxdis:autosuggestBaseUri: 'https://suggest.dxpapi.com' brxdis:environment: 'PRODUCTION' brxdis:defaultPageSize: 12 brxdis:defaultSort: ''

section.name: JCR-less operation
section.p: The plugin can run without the JCR node entirely. In that mode it builds configuration from env vars, system properties, and coded defaults. That is useful for ephemeral environments or secret-only deployments.

tr.td: Search, category browse, widget listing, and v1 recommendations.
v2 Pathways recommendations when authKey is present.

section.name: Cache behaviour
section.p: Base configuration is cached for the lifetime of the JVM and invalidated automatically when the Discovery config node changes. Env-var and system-property overrides are re-applied on each read, so credential changes do not depend on a JCR save.
